titleStmt.title: SII 23.490: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 490. (A.R. No. 490 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Uttaravēdīśvara temple—on the same wall Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 5: 1122-23 A.D.

summary.p: The details of the date viz. Simha, śu. 13, Wednesday, Hasta are found to be irregular. This registers the sale, by the Mahā-sabhā of Bhūlōkamāṇikkachaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu of 8 mā of land by two separate plots of 4 mā each, to two persons by name Śeyyapādam-śēr-kaḻal alias Poṟkōyil-pichchaṉ and Kuḻalūruḍaiyāṉ Madurāntaka-Araiyaṉ, who presented the lands as maḍappuṟam (for the maintenance of a maṭha attached) to the temple of Śonnavāraṟivār at Vīṅgunīr-Tirutturutti. The cost of the lands by itself is not specified, but the assembly is stated to have received from the temple a sum of 30 kāśu through Poṟkōyil-pichchaṉ towards cost and tax payment combined, and agreed to pay śilvari, peruvari and also the kuḍimai themselves on behalf of the temple. The land was entrusted to Poṟkōyilpichchaṉ for conducting this charity. Among the boundaries are mentioned two lands, one endowed for a watershed by Śōḻappallavaraiyaṉ and the other for a lamp by Tiruvēḻvikkuḍi Maṇavāḷanambi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrī vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku
yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu ciṅkaṇā
yaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu trayoda
śiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟ
ṟa Attattunāḷ virutarāja
payaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam pūlokamāṇikkac caruppetimaṅkalattu
mahāsabhayom viṅkunirt tirutturutti Uṭaiyār conṉavāraṟi vār ko
yil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevaṟku Iṟaiyili maṭappuṟam cetu kuṭukkaikku capaiyuḷḷiru
ntu paṇittār Irāyūr cirāmapaṭṭarum yirāyūṟ nārāyaṇa paṭ ṭarum kuṇṭur ti(ṭṭai)
llaiṉāyaka paṭṭarum Irāyūṟ koṇṭaya paṭṭarum Araṇaippuṟattu koṇṭaiya paṭṭarum
tirappil puruṣottama paṭṭarum cakkaramāṭipaṭṭarum Ivvaṉai vom Ivvāticcaṇṭe
śvaratevaṟku Iṟaiyili maṭappuṟam ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ip pūlokamāṇikkac caruppetima
ṅkalattu tiruvaraṅkavatikkuk kiḻakku karuṇākaravākkālukku teṟku yiraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu yi
raṇṭāñcatirattu Irāyūr Iḷaiya toṇṭayapaṭṭaṉpakkal vilai koṇṭu Uṭaiyomāy Eṅkaḷutā
y Irunta nilam Eṭṭu māvukku melpāṟkellai coḻappallavaraiyan taṇṇiṟpantalpuṟattuk
ku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tiruveḻvikkuṭi maṇavāḷa nampi tiru nuntāviḷakkup puṟattukku teṟkum ki
ḻpāṟkellai kaṇṭiyūrvākkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai maṇa vāḷa nampi tevatāṉattukku vaṭakkum Āka yi
caiñca peruṉān kellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Eṭṭu mā Itil ceyya pātañcerkaḻalāṉa poṟkoyil piccaṉ ko
ṇṭa nilam ṉālumāvum kuḻalūruṭaiyān maturāntaka Araiyan It tevaṟku Iṟaiili maṭappuṟamākak ko
ṇṭu viṭṭa nilam nālumāvum Āka nilam Eṭṭumāvil meṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻṉokkina kiṇaṟum Akappaṭa Iṟaiyili
ceytu kuṭuttu Iṟaiyilip poruḷukkum vilaipporuḷukkum vikku niṟt tirutturutti Uṭaiyār conṉavāraṟi
vār koyil ceyyapātañcerkaḻallāṉa poṟkoyil piccan kaiy vaḻiyākak koṇṭa kācu 3 10 Ikkā
cu muppatum koṇṭu Inṉilam Eṭṭu māvum cantirātittavaṟ Anu pavikkak kaṭavarkaḷākavum yinṉilattukku ta
laimaṭaiyāle nirpāyavum kaṭaimaṭaiyāle viḻavum peṟavum In ṉilattukku cilvari peruvari cantirāyittavaṟ nāṅka
ḷe Iṟukkakaṭavomākavum tiruvācalponta kuṭimaiyum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakaṭavomākavum Innilam Eṭṭu
māvum cantirāyittavaṟ cāśvatikamāka Iṟaiili Anupavikka con ṉavāraṟivār koyil kallilum cempilum veṭṭik
koḷḷapeṟuvatākavum Intac ceyyapātam cerkaḻalāṉa poṟkoyil piccaṉum yivaṉ vaṟkkattārum ko
ṭu Ittaṉmam celuttak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Iṟaiyili maṭappuṟañ ceytukuṭuttom mahāsa
bhayuḷḷiruntu paṇittār Irāyūr cirāmapaṭṭarum kuṇṭur tiṭṭai Akkumārapaṭṭarum Irāyūr Aruḷāḷappaṭṭanum Araṇai
ppuṟattuk koṇṭayapaṭṭarum vaṟṟalūrc cakkaramāṭipaṭṭarum kiṭāmpil puruṣottamapaṭṭarum paṇikkak keṭṭu Inta I
ṟaiyili maṭappuṟappiramāṇam Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr mattiyat(tiyat)taṉ kaṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Ayyāṟaṉ caṅkaranārā
yaṇaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur tiṭṭai Akkumārapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Araṇaippuṟattu ko
ṇṭayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Uṟuppuṭṭūr veṇṇayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr Iḷaiya toṇṭa
yapaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kiṭampuṟattu puruṣottamapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr maṇa
maṇavāḷapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr kūttāṭipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
patimaṅkalattu komapuṟattup puruṣottamapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai caṅkaranārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
ccakkarapāṇipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai Irāyūr koṇṭayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pūloka māṇikka caruppe
Iḷaiya nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṟṟalūrLines 38 to 40 are cut in bigger characters than the previous portion.
Digital edition of SII 23.490 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
